summary: Software Development Engineer with experience building cloud-native data platforms, deployment automation, and enterprise-grade backend services across Consumer Card, Liquidity Technology and Supply Chain. Skilled in AWS, Terraform, Apache Airflow, PySpark, Java, Spring Boot, CI/CD, observability, and production resilience.

experience.project: CDAI - Consumer & Community Banking Technology - Consumer Card Technology, Card Data Product
key_achievements: Led engineering delivery for Consumer Card data product platforms, converting product and business requirements into scalable cloud-native services, data workflows, and deployment automation that improved delivery predictability, operational resilience, and stakeholder confidence.

Built and maintained AWS cloud infrastructure using Terraform, enabling repeatable environment provisioning, stronger configuration control, reduced environment drift, and faster onboarding of new application components across development and test environments.

Designed and operated Apache Airflow and PySpark-based data workflows supporting card data processing, data product enablement, and downstream consumption needs, improving pipeline reliability, data freshness, and SLA adherence.

Contributed to data marketplace enablement by supporting reusable data product patterns, improving discoverability, controlled access, and consumption of curated Consumer Card datasets by downstream teams.

Implemented Release Orchestrator-based deployment automation to coordinate multi-component releases across application/service IDs, enabling controlled Stop/Deploy/Start sequencing and reducing manual release execution effort by X%.

Standardized deployment patterns using Spinnaker, Jules, AAAS/AIM-integrated workflows, and Release Orchestrator, improving release consistency, reducing coordination overhead, and increasing deployment confidence across environments.

Advanced adoption of TrueCD testing and release automation practices, helping shift quality left, strengthen production readiness, reduce late-cycle defects, and support faster delivery without compromising controls or software quality.
Improved observability and operational support using Dynatrace and Splunk, creating dashboards, alerts, and investigation workflows that reduced mean time to detect and recover from incidents by X%.

Partnered with product owners, QA, platform engineering, and application teams to manage dependencies, refine delivery scope, prioritize backlog items, and deliver production-ready capabilities aligned with Consumer Card business priorities.

Strengthened engineering governance by improving CI/CD hygiene, deployment readiness checks, runbooks, and operational playbooks, reducing recurring production support effort and improving auditability of release activities.

experience.project: RDS - Commercial & Investment Bank Technology - Payments Technology, Global Liquidity & Cash Management / Liquidity Services
key_achievements: Developed and supported backend services using Java and Spring Boot for liquidity and cash management platforms, contributing to reliable payment and liquidity processing capabilities for institutional clients achieving 99.99% uptime.

Built and enhanced service integrations supporting Global Liquidity & Cash Management workflows, improving transaction processing reliability, reducing operational exceptions, and supporting business-critical liquidity services.
Automated batch schedules and dependency-driven processing using Autosys, improving job execution reliability, reducing manual interventions, and helping meet time-sensitive operational SLAs.
Supported CI/CD and deployment processes through Jules, improving deployment repeatability, reducing release coordination effort, and enabling safer application changes across environments.
Investigated production issues across services, jobs, and integration points, delivering root-cause fixes and operational improvements that reduced repeat incidents and improved platform stability.

Collaborated with business analysts, operations users, QA, and application teams to clarify requirements, validate implementation behavior, and ensure production readiness for liquidity platform enhancements.
Tech Stack Modernization & Security Overhaul: Eliminated 100% of SSAP/SonarQube vulnerabilities post Java, Springboot and React version upgrade, achieving 75% Sonar coverage
Kafka Infrastructure Leadership: Classified 50+ Kafka topics enabling role-based access for 15+ downstream systems

experience.project: Vinturas - Private Blockchain (Hyperledger Fabric) based supply chain ecosystem
key_achievements: Cost-Efficient Architecture: Reduced IKS logging costs by 35% via Rancher/Grafana monitoring
CI/CD Innovation: Accelerated deployment cycles by 40% for 10+ Dockerized microservices
Blockchain Advancements: Built 5+ EVM D-apps reducing transaction latency by 60%
Microservice Excellence: Containerized 15+ microservices with 99.8% test coverage

education.thesis: Advanced Optimization Techniques for Engineering Applications
research_areas: Power System observability via PMU technology
